description: Claude proposes, Codex verifies, Claude revises. One task in, one reviewed answer out. The handoff you usually do by hand, pasting between two screens.

proposer.role: Propose a concrete answer to the task, then later revise it after a reviewer critiques it. Be specific and concise.

verifier.role: Skeptical reviewer. Find concrete problems, missing cases, and wrong claims. Cite file:line when reviewing code. Be specific; do not rubber-stamp.
